name: Grilled Tuna Burger with Spicy Mango Ketchup (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and season to taste with salt and pepper. Refrigerate until ready to use.
3. When ready to use, form into 1 inch thick patties.
4. Brush tuna burgers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill for 1 minute on each side for rare.
5. Serve on hamburger roll with Spicy Mango Ketchup.
Yield: 6 servings
